metadata.description: Claude Code plugins published by marsman-io. A family of phase-aware diagnostic-agent plugins — each ships four read-only agents that critique a domain (design, project management, …) through grounded conceptual lenses + a lifecycle taxonomy.

plugins.name: design-loop-methodology
plugins.description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents (design-loop, intent-lens, constraint-cascade, hierarchy-budget) that critique UI / design-system surfaces through five conceptual lenses (loop, intent, constraint, hierarchy, lifecycle). Detects bootstrap/apply/audit/tweak/refactor and composes the right skill chain. Ships 11 composable skills.

plugins.name: project-loop-methodology
plugins.description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents (project-loop, outcome-altitude, project-cascade, priority-budget) that critique projects / portfolios / change requests through five PM lenses (loop, outcome altitude, constraint, priority budget, lifecycle). Detects charter/plan/execute/adjust/replan and composes the right skill chain. Mirror of design-loop-methodology for the PM persona.
